description: Demand pattern that correlates with carbon scenario: rises to 60% during morning, peaks at 100% when carbon peaks, falls slower than carbon. 40 points matching carbon_scenario.json exactly.

explanation.points_0_7: Morning good carbon (40-80 gCO2): Demand rises slowly 30%→60%
explanation.points_8_12: Carbon degrading (120-280): Demand rises faster 65%→93%, trying to use capacity before peak
explanation.points_13_14: Carbon peak (300): Demand also at 100% maximum
explanation.points_15_24: Carbon falling (290-60): Demand falls slower than carbon (lagging), 100%→50%
explanation.points_25_28: Stable low carbon (50-55): Demand stays low 45%→43%
explanation.points_29_39: Carbon rising again (60-300): Demand rises with it 45%→100%
